case_title: LARRY RICHARDS VS. ATG REHAB SPECIALISTS OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, BAY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY RICHARDS, LARRY AS TO DEFENDANT ATG REHAB SPECIALISTS OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, BAY AREA REGION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-07-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-07-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-01-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. MEDIATED DISPOSITION. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGE; DONALD S. MITCHELL.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-01-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-13-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING IS REPORTED.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-13-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-24-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT REPRESENTED BY JANE SCHMITZ AND STEVE RICHARDS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COPYING FEES (1 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF RICHARDS, LARRY

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICHARDS, LARRY
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -JUDGE DONALD S MITCHELL-
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-20-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAY-11-2012 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-11-2012 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO JUN-26-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT, PLAINTIFF DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. CONTINUED FOR JUDGE MITCHELL TO HEAR CASE. JPT: MICHELLE MCGILL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-26-2012 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO JUL-09-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THIS IS FOR A 1/2 HOUR HEARING RELATED TO DOCUMENTS PLAINTIFF WAS UNABLE TO BRING INTO COURT TODAY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ATG REHAB SPECIALISTS OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, BAY AREA REGION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-09-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-09-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-09-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICHARDS, LARRY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ATG REHAB SPECIALISTS OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, BAY AREA REGION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
